subcodes.title: The Progress of the Soul: Words spoken ca. 1912-12-26 in London
subcodes.first_line: The mind and spirit of man advance when he is tried by suffering.
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @soul; spirit after death, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @knowledge of self, @spiritual transformation
